title: helianthus kellermanii
intro: Helianthus kellermanii, also known as the Kellerman's sunflower, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helianthus kellermanii include its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
